features.title: Cutting-Edge Security Features
features.description: Our solutions incorporate advanced technologies to ensure maximum protection of your digital assets. We offer comprehensive protection, next-generation encryption, constant monitoring, secure storage, robust infrastructure, immediate incident response, biometric authentication, granular access management and automatic security updates.

security.storageDesc: Storage systems with multiple layers of security and automatic backups.
security.serversDesc: Robust infrastructure with protection against DDoS attacks and vulnerabilities.
security.responseDesc: Immediate incident response protocols to minimize damage.
security.biometricDesc: Identity verification systems using advanced biometric recognition.
security.totalDesc: Comprehensive security solutions to protect all your digital assets against advanced threats.
security.encryptionDesc: Next-generation encryption algorithms that ensure the confidentiality of your data.
security.monitoringDesc: Constant surveillance of your systems to detect and neutralize threats in real time.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about cybersecurity and cryptocurrencies.
faq.a1: End-to-end encryption is a communication system where only the communicating users can read the messages. Neither service providers, hackers nor third parties can access the cryptographically protected content.
faq.q2: How can I protect my cryptocurrencies?
faq.a2: To protect your cryptocurrencies, use hardware wallets, enable two-factor authentication, keep your private keys offline, use strong passwords and keep your security software up to date.
faq.q3: What are the advantages of paying with cryptocurrencies?
faq.a3: Paying with cryptocurrencies offers advantages such as faster transactions, lower fees on international payments, greater privacy, full control over your funds and protection against chargeback fraud.
faq.q4: Are the encryption products you offer secure?
faq.a4: Yes, all our encryption products use military-grade algorithms (AES-256) and are regularly audited by independent security experts to ensure their robustness against vulnerabilities.
faq.q5: How can I protect myself against phishing attacks?
faq.a5: To protect yourself against phishing, always verify URLs, don't click on suspicious links, keep your browser updated, use two-factor authentication and consider using a secure password manager.
faq.q6: Do you offer technical support for your products?
faq.a6: Yes, we offer 24/7 technical support for all our products. Our team of experts is available via chat, email and phone to resolve any problem or question you may have.
